'''âb-l-t-z''' ('''kabaltezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pumicate|pumicate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-l-t-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pumicate|pumicate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-l-t-z
|-
! Lemma
| kabaltezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibaltezoko|thibaltezoko]] || [[word:jibaltezoko|jibaltezoko]] || [[word:shibaltezoko|shibaltezoko]] || [[word:kibaltezoko|kibaltezoko]]
|-

|-
